Designed for cruising and easy handling, this 2023 Owner’s Version features three spacious cabins and two bathrooms (WC), making her ideal for family trips, group adventures, or liveaboard purposes. With very low engine hours and thoughtful outfitting, she is presented in good condition and ready for new owners to enjoy.Condition & OwnershipThis particular Beneteau Oceanis 46.1 for sale 2023 is privately owned and has seen minimal use since delivery. descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 46.1 for sale 2023 | Owner's Version - 3 Cabins | Tax Not Paid
Engine use 150 hour ONLY!!

If you’re looking for a modern and well-equipped sailing yacht, the Beneteau Oceanis 46.1 for sale 2023 offers a balanced mix of comfort, performance, and reliability. Designed for cruising and easy handling, this 2023 Owner’s Version features three spacious cabins and two bathrooms (WC), making her ideal for family trips, group adventures, or liveaboard purposes. With very low engine hours and thoughtful outfitting, she is presented in good condition and ready for new owners to enjoy.

Condition & Ownership

This particular Beneteau Oceanis 46.1 for sale 2023 is privately owned and has seen minimal use since delivery. The current owner reports she is almost never used, and has been kept in brand new condition. She is UK flagged, with VAT not paid, giving flexibility for buyers considering usage in non-EU waters or buyers outside Europe. With only 150 hours on the Yanmar engine, her mechanical systems are barely broken in.

(Autopilot, Bow Thrustrer, Solar Panels, Dinghy...)

Key Specifications

  • Boat Type: Furling
  • Year Built: 2023
  • Owner’s Version: 3 cabins, 2 heads (WC)
  • Engine: Yanmar 4jh80 (80hp) with only 150 hours
  • Mainsail: Furling, 2023
  • Genoa: Roller, 2023
  • Bow thruster
  • Solar Panels: 2
  • Flag: UK
  • VAT Status: Not paid
  • Length Overall (LOA): 14.60m
  • Beam: 4.5m
  • Draft: 2.35m
  • Fuel Tank: 200 litres
  • Water Tank: 370 litres
  • Steering: 2 wheels
  • Autopilot: Raymarine
  • Plotter: Yes
  • GPS: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: Fusion RA70, cockpit speakers, radio
  • Onboard Capacity: Not specified
  • Dinghy included, Outboard included

This Beneteau Oceanis 46.1 for sale 2023 represents an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a late-model, nearly unused sailing yacht in good condition. With high-quality equipment, modern comforts, and thoughtful layout, she is well suited for enjoyable cruising, coastal exploring, or extended stays aboard. To schedule a viewing or for any more information, don't hesitate to contact us!!
